step.name: detect
step.action: Identify build tool (Vite / Webpack) + current test runner.

step.name: pick-runner
step.action: Vitest default unless blocker; record decision.

step.name: wire-dom-http
step.action: Add Testing Library if DOM. Add MSW if HTTP.

step.name: configure-coverage
step.action: Set V8 provider + branch=true + thresholds from code-coverage methodology.
step.decision-gate: If repo is legacy, drop global_threshold to current and rely on diff_threshold.

step.name: ci-wire
step.action: Add CI step: run tests with coverage, diff-cov gate, publish artefact.
